Hero.subtitle: Front-End Developer
Hero.valueProposition: I build fast, clean, and scalable web applications, bringing a unique business-driven approach to Front-End development.

About.title: About Me
About.content: I am a Front-End Developer based in Mie, Japan, specializing in Next.js, React, and TypeScript. With a decade of prior experience in business and sales in Brazil, I bring a unique perspective to coding: I don't just build software, I build solutions that align with client goals and drive real results. Currently, I am focused on continuous learning and creating high-quality, practical web applications.

Footer.tagline: Bridging business needs with modern technology.
